advice.title: You broke the build often
advice.body: You broke the build on 1/3 checkpoints (33%). Frequent breakage masks the source of new failures and forces you to debug stale code alongside new code.

advice.title: You never committed during this session
advice.body: You went 3 checkpoints with no commit. Commits are cheap restore points; without them you can't bisect, can't revert cleanly, and your PR diff balloons.

advice.title: Process score fell over the session
advice.body: Your process score fell from 50 to 34 (-16 points). Your end-of-session state is worse than your start — look at the chart for where the drop happened.
